docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,013.00 FILED BY HE, QINYUE AS TO DEFENDANT JIANG, MANYU ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0 SERVED MAY-18-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT JIANG, MANYU

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-20-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-20-2025. VISITING JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF QINYUE HE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANYU JIANG IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HE, QINYUE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JIANG, MANYU PLAINTIFF WAS RENTING AN UNPERMITTED SPACE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
